free_text: Interaction between 3He and 6,7Li nuclei
Isochronous cyclotron U-240
49.2 mg/cm2 thick,
58.1 mg/cm2 thick.
All targets 20 mm in diameter.
DeltaE-E telescope consisting of
semiconductor surface-barrier silicon detector 700 mu-m
thick and a scintillation  NaI(Tl) detector.
